title: Draft hold rule for near-watchlist first cross-border payouts
plain_language_rule: Hold a payout when the beneficiary is a near-watchlist match and it is the first cross-border payout to that beneficiary, with a large amount jump and either a very new payout device or a recently reactivated wallet.

include_features.reason: Appears in 8 of 10 reviewed cases and is central to the scenario family.
Separates most reviewed risk cases from repeat beneficiary cases.
Keeps the rule robust without forcing both signals to be present.

excluded_features.reason: Too corridor-specific for this rule family.
Too narrow and likely to overfit to one cluster.
Not relevant to the hero payout scenario.

projected_impact.summary: The proposal catches one more reviewed true positive than the baseline but adds one extra good-user hold.

required_human_checks: Confirm that the similarity threshold is acceptable for warning-level review and not too aggressive.
Review the one added false-positive hold before approving shadow mode.
Keep the rule in draft or shadow state only for the hackathon demo.
next_action: Run replay, show tradeoff, then save as draft.
